message:
fix(cli): support reading context from special files in render command

Remove the statSync pre-check that determined bytes to read, since
special files like /dev/stdin or /proc entries report size 0 via stat.
Instead, allocate maxContext+1 bytes directly and let readSync return
the actual byte count. This also drops the unused statSync import.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
